overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit covered cyberpunk market with Japanese-inspired red lanterns and various food stalls. The player explores the bustling market corridor, passing vendors and NPCs, and investigates a stairway area at the back before turning around.

events.description: moving from initial vendor stall into the main market corridor with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market, approaching the first food stall

notable_agents.action: vendor in black shirt arranging items behind the counter
customer in red jacket sitting on stool at food stall counter

entered.detail: concrete counter with condiments and digital displays
traditional Japanese-style red lanterns hanging from the industrial ceiling
glowing cyan digital monitors displaying data
large rusted metal structural beam with white and black stripes
cyan and red neon lighting strips illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a vendor stall in a covered cyberpunk market. The camera moves forward into a corridor lined with industrial pillars and illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon lights. A customer in a red jacket sits at a food stall on the left as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall area with illuminated display counter

events.description: slowing down to observe the food display counter with illuminated plates
passing close to the glass food display counter, temporarily blocking view of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past the food display counter, observing the vendor and food items

notable_agents.action: vendor with pink hair working behind the food counter, cooking on a grill
woman in revealing outfit with blue and green accents standing near the stall

entered.detail: illuminated glass case displaying various food items on white plates
large vertical red banner with white text reading MASAMI MARKET
hanging digital screens showing food advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player moves along a food stall with an illuminated glass display case showing various dishes. A vendor with pink hair works behind the counter while red paper lanterns hang overhead. The Masami Market banner becomes visible on the right as the camera passes a woman standing near the stall entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor leading to back stairway

events.description: entering darker section of the market with purple neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls
approaching the concrete stairway at the end of the market corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the market corridor toward the back stairway, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera through the corridor
couple standing together near the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward against a dark wall
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
horizontal purple neon tube light above the stairway entrance
red and yellow vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the market corridor, passing NPCs walking in the opposite direction. The environment becomes darker with purple neon lighting. A concrete stairway with graffiti-covered walls becomes visible at the end of the corridor, with a couple standing nearby and a vending machine on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of market near stairway and vending machines

events.description: stopping near the couple at the stairs, then turning around to walk back through the market
moving back through the market past different stalls and a red vending machine

agents.ego_description: observing the stairway area, then turning and walking back through the market

notable_agents.action: couple embracing near the graffiti wall at the stairway entrance
vendor in green shirt standing behind a food counter

entered.detail: bright red vending machine with yellow top and glowing product display
food counter with vendor wearing green shirt and face mask

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the back of the market near a concrete stairway with graffiti walls, where a couple stands embracing. After a brief pause, the camera turns around and walks back through the market, passing a food stall with a vendor in a green shirt and ending near a prominent red vending machine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk market that leads to a secluded concrete stairway before retracing its steps. It begins at a vendor stall, moving forward into a corridor defined by industrial pillars and the warm glow of red paper lanterns. As the camera glides past a food stall with an illuminated glass display and a pink-haired vendor, the Masami Market banner emerges on the right. The scene then shifts into a darker atmosphere dominated by purple neon lighting as the camera passes oncoming pedestrians toward a graffiti-covered concrete stairway where a couple stands embracing. Finally, the camera turns around and walks back through the bustling market, passing a vendor in a green shirt before coming to a stop near a prominent red vending machine.
